items.title: Fair hyperparameter comparison
items.description: Teams fix seeds and data splits so learning-rate or architecture sweeps reflect true differences, not random initialization luck.

items.title: Paper and benchmark submissions
items.description: Authors publish seeds, environment files, and Docker tags so reviewers and competitors can approximate reported leaderboard scores.

items.title: Production model audits
items.description: Regulated domains require demonstrating that a deployed model can be retrained to the same validation metrics from documented inputs.

items.title: Debugging flaky CI pipelines
items.description: ML tests that pass intermittently often need explicit seeds and pinned dependencies so failures reproduce locally.

items.title: A/B test analysis for ML features
items.description: When comparing two model versions, fixed seeds on offline replay datasets isolate model changes from shuffle variance in evaluation slices.
